releaseNotes: Streaming reliability and performance: fixed a background CPU drain (the live stream kept decoding even after switching away to another app), a channel-load slowdown caused by an inefficient database query, and channels that would freeze or show corrupted colors on certain 4K/Dolby Vision streams. The TV Guide now shows the full multi-day schedule instead of just a few hours, Multi-Screen no longer requires opening an account elsewhere first, and two D-pad focus bugs in the Guide screen are fixed.
